qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Pharmacology/ Life Sciences with any specializations from a recognized University (As per ANRF rules) with 2 years of experience in relevant field
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Pharmacology/ Life Sciences with any specializations from a recognized University (As per ANRF rules). 2 years of experience in a relevant field.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PGIMER Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PGIMER Senior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGIMER Senior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Senior Research Fellow position at PGIMER is 12th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Pharmacology or Life Sciences with any specializations from a recognized University, along with 2 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification, Shortlisting of candidates, and an Interview.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Senior Research Fellow position will be as per ANRF rules.

faq.question: Q6. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Department of Pharmacology at the Post Graduate Institute of Medical Education and Research Chandigarh (PGIMER).

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Senior Research Fellow post announced in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for this position by sending their application via email.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Senior Research Fellow position is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location is Chandigarh.
